title: Taproot PSBT Fields
description: Taproot-specific PSBT input and output fields for carrying internal keys, leaf scripts, merkle data, and Taproot derivation metadata without redefining the broader PSBT workflow.

resources.title: BIP 371: Taproot Fields for PSBT
resources.notes: Canonical specification for Taproot-specific PSBT input and output fields.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: PSBT
resources.notes: Implementation-oriented context for PSBT evolution, including Taproot field support across wallets and libraries.

resources.title: BIP 174: Partially Signed Bitcoin Transaction Format
resources.notes: Base PSBT field model that BIP 371 extends for Taproot data.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for wallet construction, signing workflows, and Taproot-era transaction structure.
